channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19438] the project file quota is decreased incorrectly during destroying the agent inode
item.description:
When creating remote directory, the file project quota for the agent inode has been
transferred to the project ID 0 if the project ID of the parent directory isn't 0 and the flag
LUSTRE_PROJINHERIT_FL is set, but the project ID of the agent inode is reset, then
the file project quota is decreased during destroying the agent inode when the remote
directory is removed.

[root@vm435 tests]# ../utils/lfs quota -p 1000 -v /mnt/lustre
Disk quotas for prj <unknown> (pid 1000):
     Filesystem  kbytes  bquota  blimit  bgrace   files  iquota  ilimit  igrace 
    /mnt/lustre       8       0       0       -       2       0       0       - 
 lustre-MDT0000       4       -       0       -       1       -       0       - 
 lustre-MDT0001       4       -       0       -       1       -       0       - 
 lustre-MDT0002       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
 lustre-MDT0003       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
 lustre-OST0000       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
 lustre-OST0001       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
Total allocated inode limit: 0, total allocated block limit: 0
[root@vm435 tests]# rmdir /mnt/lustre/tdir/tsubdir/
[root@vm435 tests]# sync
[root@vm435 tests]# ../utils/lfs quota -p 1000 -v /mnt/lustre
Disk quotas for prj <unknown> (pid 1000):
     Filesystem  kbytes  bquota  blimit  bgrace   files  iquota  ilimit  igrace 
    /mnt/lustre       0       0       0       -       0       0       0       - 
 lustre-MDT0000       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
 lustre-MDT0001       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
 lustre-MDT0002       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
 lustre-MDT0003       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
 lustre-OST0000       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
 lustre-OST0001       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
Total allocated inode limit: 0, total allocated block limit: 0
[root@vm435 tests]#
item.summary: the project file quota is decreased incorrectly during destroying the agent inode

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
